violations.text: The refuse enclosures were observed with debris behind cardboard dumpster. Refuse enclosures must be kept free of clutter and debris to help prevent pest harborage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by live and dead roach activity observed in storage room at time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in several refrigeration units were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
The outside dumpsters were not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The refuse enclosures were observed with an accumulation of garbage and debris on the floor. Refuse enclosures must be kept free of clutter and debris to help prevent pest harborage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC stated they will talk with the dumpster company about not dropping dumpster off so close to fence to allow dumpster to close. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
